# forgotPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the forgotPassword mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.forgotPassword({ input: { email: '<Email>' } }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run forgotPassword

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.forgotPassword({ input: { email: '<Email>' } }).execute();
```
